name: Death by Chocolate
recipeIngredient: 3 packages Instant Chocolate Mousse (4 1/2 cup servings each)
8 1.4 oz chocolate-covered Toffee candy bars (Skor or Heath)
1 12 oz container Frozen Whipped Topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven according to brownie package instructions.
2. Bake brownies according to package directions; cool.
3. Meanwhile, prepare chocolate mousse according to package directions.
4. Break candy bars into small pieces in a food processor or by tapping wrapped bars with a hammer.
5. Break half the brownies into small pieces and place them in the bottom of a large glass bowl.
6. Cover with half the mousse, then half the candy, and then half the whipped topping.
7. Repeat layers with the remaining ingredients.
8. Refrigerate until serving.
